understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' was occupied simultaneously, progressing through all levels until the game reported WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done by either step moves (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece or by clicking target positions to redirect/teleport/command the selected piece toward that coordinate; pieces could be blocked by walls/obstacles and possibly by other pieces, causing clicks or moves to have no effect when the path or destination was obstructed. Selection could be changed with CLICK on another selectable piece's position, after which subsequent actions applied to the newly selected piece; winning required correct final placement within the finite step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' was occupied simultaneously, progressing through all levels until the game reported WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was done by either step moves (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) for the currently selected piece or by clicking target positions to redirect/teleport/command the selected piece toward that coordinate; pieces could be blocked by walls/obstacles and possibly by other pieces, causing clicks or moves to have no effect when the path or destination was obstructed. Selection could be changed with CLICK on another selectable piece's position, after which subsequent actions applied to the newly selected piece; winning required correct final placement within the finite step budget.
